markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Evaluate GrowthX's AI content service for Schedulo.](https://fathom.video/share/dkn8YzYmJa2844x_7Rj5qT6WgLBcz8Hg?tab=summary&timestamp=39.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Schedulo's Need:** Fractional CMO Alex Ortiz needs to rebuild growth at Schedulo ($30M ARR, Series C) and is evaluating GrowthX as a turnkey service to accelerate AI-driven content production.](https://fathom.video/share/dkn8YzYmJa2844x_7Rj5qT6WgLBcz8Hg?tab=summary&timestamp=46.0)
  - [**GrowthX's Pitch:** A full-service partner (strategy → publishing) that frees up client teams from building and maintaining AI workflows, contrasting with tools like Aerops that require heavy internal staffing.](https://fathom.video/share/dkn8YzYmJa2844x_7Rj5qT6WgLBcz8Hg?tab=summary&timestamp=265.0)
  - [**Key Constraint:** The current team is lean, with Alex as the sole content approver. This makes GrowthX's turnkey model attractive, but the high initial cost ($40k onboarding + $23k/mo) is a major hurdle.](https://fathom.video/share/dkn8YzYmJa2844x_7Rj5qT6WgLBcz8Hg?tab=summary&timestamp=627.0)
  - [**Next Step:** A follow-up call is needed to scope a more affordable package for Schedulo, as the current pricing is prohibitive.](https://fathom.video/share/dkn8YzYmJa2844x_7Rj5qT6WgLBcz8Hg?tab=summary&timestamp=1785.0)

## Topics

### Schedulo's Context & Need

  - [**Role:** Alex Ortiz is the new fractional CMO for Schedulo, a Series C company with $30M ARR.](https://fathom.video/share/dkn8YzYmJa2844x_7Rj5qT6WgLBcz8Hg?tab=summary&timestamp=46.0)
  - [**Goal:** Rebuild growth after recent layoffs.](https://fathom.video/share/dkn8YzYmJa2844x_7Rj5qT6WgLBcz8Hg?tab=summary&timestamp=486.0)
  - [**Current State:**](https://fathom.video/share/dkn8YzYmJa2844x_7Rj5qT6WgLBcz8Hg?tab=summary&timestamp=486.0)
      - [A lean team with one freelance writer ($4-5k/mo) and one freelance designer.](https://fathom.video/share/dkn8YzYmJa2844x_7Rj5qT6WgLBcz8Hg?tab=summary&timestamp=486.0)
      - [An anecdotal report of AI-driven referrals, but no formal strategy or data.](https://fathom.video/share/dkn8YzYmJa2844x_7Rj5qT6WgLBcz8Hg?tab=summary&timestamp=531.0)
      - [A content audit revealed 350+ pieces over 10 years, with gaps in middle-of-funnel offers (e.g., ROI calculators).](https://fathom.video/share/dkn8YzYmJa2844x_7Rj5qT6WgLBcz8Hg?tab=summary&timestamp=888.0)
  - [**Evaluation:** The CEO was already evaluating Aerops, prompting Alex to add GrowthX to ensure a comprehensive review.](https://fathom.video/share/dkn8YzYmJa2844x_7Rj5qT6WgLBcz8Hg?tab=summary&timestamp=166.0)

### GrowthX's Solution & Process

  - [**Core Value Prop:** A full-service partner that handles the entire AI content pipeline (strategy, execution, publishing, monitoring), freeing client teams from technical overhead.](https://fathom.video/share/dkn8YzYmJa2844x_7Rj5qT6WgLBcz8Hg?tab=summary&timestamp=310.0)
  - [**Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/dkn8YzYmJa2844x_7Rj5qT6WgLBcz8Hg?tab=summary&timestamp=761.0)
    1.  [**Strategy Sprint (8 weeks):** Produces 5–10+ articles to establish quality and define the long-term roadmap.](https://fathom.video/share/dkn8YzYmJa2844x_7Rj5qT6WgLBcz8Hg?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
    2.  [**Growth Execution (Ongoing):** Executes on the roadmap, starting with editorial content (blogs, guides) and potentially expanding to programmatic use cases (e.g., Ramp's vendor directory).](https://fathom.video/share/dkn8YzYmJa2844x_7Rj5qT6WgLBcz8Hg?tab=summary&timestamp=812.0)
  - [**Onboarding:** A low-friction process requiring only a 1-hour kickoff and a 45-minute product deep dive. GrowthX ingests client resources (brand guides, transcripts) to build "artifacts"—detailed context documents that guide the AI.](https://fathom.video/share/dkn8YzYmJa2844x_7Rj5qT6WgLBcz8Hg?tab=summary&timestamp=1502.0)
  - [**Platform:** An internal tool that uses artifacts and a knowledge graph to power agentic pipelines for research, drafting, and optimization. Human writers fine-tune each step and use AI-assisted editing.](https://fathom.video/share/dkn8YzYmJa2844x_7Rj5qT6WgLBcz8Hg?tab=summary&timestamp=1277.0)

### Scoping & Pricing

  - [**Content Scope:**](https://fathom.video/share/dkn8YzYmJa2844x_7Rj5qT6WgLBcz8Hg?tab=summary&timestamp=1081.0)
      - [**Primary Focus:** SEO/AEO content (editorial, programmatic).](https://fathom.video/share/dkn8YzYmJa2844x_7Rj5qT6WgLBcz8Hg?tab=summary&timestamp=1081.0)
      - [**Out of Scope:** Product/use case pages (best handled in-house).](https://fathom.video/share/dkn8YzYmJa2844x_7Rj5qT6WgLBcz8Hg?tab=summary&timestamp=1081.0)
      - [**Potential Add-on:** CEO thought leadership for LinkedIn.](https://fathom.video/share/dkn8YzYmJa2844x_7Rj5qT6WgLBcz8Hg?tab=summary&timestamp=1194.0)
  - [**Pricing:** The initial quote was a significant concern for Alex.](https://fathom.video/share/dkn8YzYmJa2844x_7Rj5qT6WgLBcz8Hg?tab=summary&timestamp=1785.0)
      - [**Onboarding:** $40,000](https://fathom.video/share/dkn8YzYmJa2844x_7Rj5qT6WgLBcz8Hg?tab=summary&timestamp=1785.0)
      - [**Monthly Retainer:** $23,000](https://fathom.video/share/dkn8YzYmJa2844x_7Rj5qT6WgLBcz8Hg?tab=summary&timestamp=1785.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Tyler:** Send the Statement of Work (SoW) to Alex.](https://fathom.video/share/dkn8YzYmJa2844x_7Rj5qT6WgLBcz8Hg?tab=summary&timestamp=1880.0)
  - [**Tyler:** Research Schedulo's competitors (Salesforce Field Service Lightning, ServiceNow, etc.) for the follow-up call.](https://fathom.video/share/dkn8YzYmJa2844x_7Rj5qT6WgLBcz8Hg?tab=summary&timestamp=1812.0)
  - [**Alex & Tyler:** Schedule a follow-up call to scope a more affordable package for Schedulo.](https://fathom.video/share/dkn8YzYmJa2844x_7Rj5qT6WgLBcz8Hg?tab=summary&timestamp=1785.0)
